tickets.title: Kanban Board Improvement & Agent Monitoring
tickets.description: Improve the Kanban board design and functionality. Monitor agent activity. Fix any broken functionality.

comments.text: ✅ Mobile-first overhaul completed: single-column board with picker, swipe gestures, pull-to-refresh, light/dark theme toggle, offline detection, bottom sheet detail panel, larger touch targets, improved empty states.

tickets.title: Kanban v2: Pull-to-refresh, Theme Toggle, Empty States, Offline Detection
tickets.description: Add pull-to-refresh on mobile, light/dark mode toggle with persistence, improved empty states with illustrations, and offline connectivity detection banner.

comments.text: ✅ All features deployed: pull-to-refresh gesture, light/dark theme toggle with localStorage, improved empty states with emoji illustrations, offline detection banner.

tickets.title: Iris Jira↔Kanban Two-Way Sync System
tickets.description: Set up Iris agent to continuously sync Mission Control Kanban with Jira board in both directions. Kanban→Jira push + Jira→Kanban pull. Status, title, priority, assignee always in parity. Uses iris-sync.py script.

comments.text: 🔨 Creating Iris as dedicated Jira sync agent. Two-way sync script iris-sync.py created. Agent workspace at workers/iris/.
✅ Sync system operational. 30 Kanban tickets pushed to Jira (TD-68→TD-97). Two-way sync script iris-sync.py working. Parity check passing.

tickets.title: Board Quality Supervision & Parity Checks
tickets.description: Iris to run regular parity checks between Kanban and Jira. Flag orphaned tickets, inconsistent statuses, missing epics. Board quality report daily.

comments.text: ✅ Board quality supervision active. Parity check system working — verified 30/30 tickets match between Kanban and Jira.

tickets.title: Agent onboarding documentation
tickets.description: Create comprehensive onboarding docs for new agents: setup guide, role descriptions, workflow examples, best practices.

tickets.title: Voice Bridge Bot — Real-time voice conversation with Lucy in Discord
tickets.description: Build a Discord voice bridge bot that enables real-time voice conversation with Lucy in Discord voice channels (like Jarvis). Components: 1) Discord bot joins voice channel, 2) Whisper STT transcribes user speech, 3) Text sent to Lucy via OpenClaw, 4) Lucy's response converted to speech via ElevenLabs TTS, 5) Bot speaks response in voice channel. Prerequisites: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY (done), Whisper (done), @discordjs/voice (done). Build as a new service on VM, independent of but integrated with OpenClaw gateway.

comments.text: All core components already in place: ElevenLabs API key, Whisper, @discordjs/voice. Just need to wire them together.

tickets.title: VM Security Hardening — Fix world-writable files, secure ports, harden firewall
tickets.description: Remediate security audit findings from 2026-06-15 on companyserver VM. Tasks: 1) Fix world-writable files (owl-bridge/*.txt → chmod 600), 2) Audit all open ports and close unnecessary ones, 3) Harden UFW firewall rules (deny all incoming except Tailscale/SSH), 4) Disable unused services, 5) Set up fail2ban for SSH brute-force protection, 6) Enable automatic security updates (unattended-upgrades), 7) Run Lynis security scan and remediate findings. Assignee: Hades (Security Specialist) with Thor (Infrastructure) for VM-level changes.

comments.text: Security audit 2026-06-15 found: world-writable files on VM, open ports (18789, 41505, 11434), cron failures from gateway restarts. Starting remediation.

tickets.title: Automated Security Scanning & Monitoring Setup
tickets.description: Set up continuous security monitoring to prevent future audit findings. Tasks: 1) Install and configure Lynis for weekly automated security scans, 2) Set up AIDE (Advanced Intrusion Detection Environment) for file integrity monitoring, 3) Configure logwatch for daily security log summaries, 4) Set up rkhunter for rootkit scanning, 5) Create a security dashboard showing open ports, failed SSH attempts, and file permission anomalies, 6) Add security alerts to the monitoring system (Argus). Ensures future issues are caught automatically.

comments.text: After hardening (TICKET-048), set up automated scanning to maintain security posture. Depends on TICKET-048 completion for baseline.

tickets.description: 18 agents missing workspaces on VM. Need SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, work-template.sh for each.
